results.name: Priyanka Chopra

STEP 3 - Chroma appears medium to high with clear, defined features and good color saturation. STEP 4 - High contrast between the very dark hair and lighter skin tone. The warm peach/salmon tones in the outfit complement the warm undertones beautifully, confirming the warm seasonal classification.

results.name: Jennifer Aniston
results.reasoning: Following the 6-step methodology: 1) Skin undertone appears cool-neutral with no golden warmth visible - the skin has a neutral-cool cast rather than peachy or golden tones. 2) Value is light to medium - fair skin with medium blonde hair creates a light overall impression. 3) Chroma is muted to medium - the coloring has a soft, blended quality rather than high saturation. 4) Contrast is low to medium - similar values between hair and skin create gentle contrast. 5) Cross-validation points to Summer family due to cool undertones and muted quality. The lightness and soft contrast specifically indicate Light Summer rather than True or Soft Summer. 6) Korean system aligns with Light tone category. The overall impression is of soft, cool-toned coloring with gentle contrast.

results.name: Cate Blanchett
results.reasoning: This person displays classic Light Summer characteristics. The skin has a cool, soft pink undertone without golden warmth. The blonde hair appears ashy rather than golden, lacking the warm butter tones of Light Spring. The overall coloring is light but with a soft, muted quality rather than the bright clarity of Spring seasons. The eyes appear light and cool-toned, harmonizing with the overall cool palette. The delicate, refined coloring and the way the features blend harmoniously together (low contrast) points definitively to Light Summer rather than Light Spring.

results.name: Anne Hathaway
results.reasoning: Following the 6-step methodology: (1) Skin undertone shows warm golden tones, particularly visible in the natural lighting. (2) Value/depth is medium-deep with rich dark brown hair and medium skin depth. (3) Chroma is medium - colors are rich but not extremely vivid or muted. (4) Contrast level is medium-high between the dark hair and lighter skin. (5) Cross-validation points to Autumn family due to warm undertones and medium-deep coloring, specifically Deep Autumn due to the darker hair and richer overall coloring. (6) Korean system aligns with Deep tone classification. The warm golden undertones in the skin, rich dark brown hair with subtle warm highlights, and overall depth of coloring all point to Deep Autumn rather than a Winter season.

results.name: Megan Fox
results.reasoning: This person displays classic Dark Winter characteristics: very dark hair (black/near-black) creating high contrast with medium skin tone, cool undertones evident in the skin's overall cast, and the ability to handle saturated colors. The skin appears to have cool undertones without golden warmth, and the high contrast between the dark hair and skin tone is a hallmark of Dark Winter. The deep, rich coloring and ability to wear bold, saturated colors confirms this classification. However, the lighting appears to be stage/event lighting which may affect color accuracy, hence the slightly lower confidence score.

results.name: Taylor Swift
results.reasoning: The subject displays classic Light Summer characteristics: ashy blonde hair with cool undertones (no golden warmth visible), fair skin with pink/cool undertones rather than golden warmth, and blue eyes that appear soft rather than vivid. The overall coloring is light but muted rather than bright or clear. The hair appears to be a natural ashy blonde without golden highlights, which is a strong Light Summer indicator. The skin tone appears cool-toned with pink undertones rather than peachy/golden warmth that would indicate Spring. The eye color appears to be a soft blue-gray rather than the vivid blue of a Winter. The contrast level is low to medium, which fits Light Summer rather than the high contrast of Winter or the golden warmth of Light Spring. However, lighting appears to be indoor/artificial which may slightly affect color accuracy.

results.name: Jessica Alba
results.reasoning: Following the 6-step methodology: 1) Skin undertone shows clear warm olive coloring with golden undertones visible in the face and neck area. 2) Value is medium-deep - darker brunette hair with medium-toned skin creates substantial depth. 3) Chroma appears muted to medium - colors are rich but not highly saturated or bright. 4) Contrast level is moderate - brunette hair against medium skin tone. 5) Season mapping: warm undertone + medium-deep value + muted chroma points to Deep Autumn family. 6) Korean classification aligns with Deep tone category due to the rich, substantial coloring. The warm golden undertones in the skin, rich brown hair with golden highlights, and overall earthy warmth throughout the features all strongly indicate Deep Autumn rather than a cool season.

results.name: Angelina Jolie
results.reasoning: The subject displays classic Soft Summer characteristics: cool undertones with medium depth and muted chroma. The skin has a cool base without strong pink or yellow dominance, suggesting neutral-cool undertones. The hair is an ashy blonde with brown lowlights, lacking golden warmth and appearing muted rather than bright. The eyes appear to be a soft hazel or light brown. The overall coloring is harmonious and muted rather than high contrast. The deep berry lip color works well, which is typical for Soft Summer who can handle some depth in cool tones. The lighting appears to be professional/studio lighting which may add some warmth, but the underlying cool undertones are still visible.

results.name: Lucy Liu
results.reasoning: This analysis is based on several key observations: 1) Very dark, cool-toned black hair that appears rich and saturated, 2) Medium-depth skin with cool undertones - while there's some yellow in the skin, it reads as neutral-cool rather than warm golden, 3) High contrast between the very dark hair and lighter skin tone, 4) Clear, bright coloring overall with high chroma, 5) The natural lip color appears to be a cool-toned pink rather than warm coral/peach, 6) The overall impression is crisp and clear rather than muted or soft. The combination of very dark hair, cool-leaning skin, and high contrast points definitively to Deep Winter rather than Deep Autumn (which would have warmer undertones) or other seasons.
